## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `AGENTS.md` and followed `miRNA-qPCR-reanalysis.md`
- [ ] I preserved fixed groups (`S`, `G`, `P`) and fixed tasks (`S vs G`, `G vs P`, `S vs P`)
- [ ] All observable computations are notebook-visible
- [ ] I labeled exploratory analyses explicitly
- [ ] I documented assumptions/discrepancies where needed
- [ ] Notebook runs from a fresh kernel without manual intervention
- [ ] Major outputs are saved to `outputs/`

## Validation

- [ ] I executed relevant notebook sections end-to-end
- [ ] I checked for leakage-safe modeling and feature selection
- [ ] I verified interpretations match evidence strength
